subtopics.title: Mmalite Okwu Igbo
common_misconceptions: Igbo bu asusu otu (Igbo nwere orlu, owerri, onitsha, bida, nkwa)
Aha nwoke na nwaanyi di otu (agagh)
subtopics.teaching_note: Asusu Igbo bu asusu ndi Igbo na Naijiria. Ndi Igbo di na Abia, Anambra, Ebonyi, Enugu, Imo. Ihe karịrị nde 30 na-asu Igbo. Akwa okwu Igbo: Aha - nmadu, anu, nri, ulo. Omume - riri, gara, kuru. Mgbaama - m, gị, ọ, anyị, unu, ha. Omumaatu - oma, oke, nta. Nkowa - nke ọma, ngwa ngwa.

subtopics.title: Omenala Ndi Igbo
common_misconceptions: Ọfọ bu nani ekwensu (ọ bu ekpere nke di oke mkpa)
Igba nkwu bu ihe na-achọsi ike
subtopics.teaching_note: Ọfọ: ekpere ndi Igbo, nke na-egosi eziokwu na ikpe ziri ezi. Igba nkwu: emume a na-eme maka iri nkwu ọhụrụ. Igbu ewu ukwu: emume ncheta nna nna. Akwam ozu: ilo nne nne na nna nna. Igba nkwu nwaanyị: emume e si aba nwaanyị nke abuo. Omenala Igbo na-akwanyere ùgwù onye ọ bụla ùgwù.
